details.IncidentDetail: "[75] INVLD PTY (TYLER ) IN WHI FORD RANGER CALLED IN - ADVS SV BRAKE CHECKED HIM AND CAUSED THE TC // FRIEND WAS FOLLOWING BEHIND AND CHASED AFTER THE SV TO GET SV INFO // INVLD GOT OUT OF TK AND WAS DISORIENTED, HE MANAGED TO GET OVER TO THE RHS AND LOST HIS FOOTING AND FELL APPROX 30 FT DOWN INTO A DITCH // WAS ABLE TO GET BACK UP AND WAS WALKING AROUND CITY STREETS // FRIEND WAS FINALLY ABLE TO LOCATE HIM AND ARE NOW AT SHARP CHULA VISTA IN THE ER (NO ASSIGNED ROOM OR BED AT THIS TIME) // REQ A UNIT FOR CONTACT AND TO PROVIDE A STATEMENT"
"[68] A108-081 UTL ON SV 2 VEH 20002 FOR NOW - 93 WILL BE DOING AI "
"[7] AIRBAGS DEPLOYED , WHI FORD RANGER IS 1125 IN LNS , DRIVER IS ON THE LHS "
"[5] LINE 4 FOR THE VEH THAT CAUSED THE ACCIDENT "
"[3] WHI FORD RANGER VS BLK CHEV COLORADO "
"[1] [Intersection: I8 W SR67 N CON / SR67 N] [Low] [Information] THERE IS NO NB 67 TRANS TO THE 8 (ONLY SB)"
